intro: A fearless cat and a very long way up!
description:
Only Kitty Cat Up is a cute but brutally addictive climbing adventure where you play as a tiny, fearless cat chasing one simple dream — reach the very top.

Jump from object to object, climb higher and higher, and test your patience, timing, and focus in a journey where every move matters. One small mistake can send you falling back down… but a true kitty never gives up.

This is a game about determination, precision, and that unstoppable “just one more try” feeling.  
Soft paws, hard jumps, and a long way to the top.

Cute on the outside.  
Challenging on the inside.
